tid#Skill_EntryDesc_246: *Blood Guardian: Increases basic stats by 5% and reduces damage taken by 10%. When this effect ends or the caster dies, increases the caster’s ATK-related stats by 10%.

tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_328: *Ultra-Heartbreak: Increases the PEN Rate of this skill by 20% (ignoring DEF), and deals extra damage equal to 15% of Max HP
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_329: *Ultra-Temptation: Ignores DEF and Block Chance, increases Max HP by 30% of the damage dealt this time. The HP increase cannot exceed 40% of Basic Max HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_333: *Care: Immune to debuffs and basic stat reduction.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_334: *Growth: Increases DEF by 8% and Block Rate by 8%.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_335: *Blessing: All stats +6%; While this effect is active, the number of allied action slots will not drop below 3.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_336: *Confrontation: All allies take 30% less damage from AoE skills; When other allies take damage, takes 80% of the damage dealt.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_333: *Ultra-Care: Immune to debuffs and basic stat reduction; When attacked, the attacker's CRIT Rate is treated as 0; When taking CRIT damage, reduces the damage by 50%.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_337: *Dust: Nullifies the target's passive effects. After the affected target is attacked by an active skill, the target takes 4% more damage for 1 turn, up to 3 stacks.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_340: *Ability Growth: Basic Stats +4%; CRIT DEF +5%; Lifesteal Rate +8%.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_337: *Ultra-Dust: Nullifies the target's passive effects. After the affected target is attacked by an active skill, the target takes 7% more damage for 2 turns, up to 3 stacks.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_348: *Blazeflame: CRIT Rate doubled. With Immortal: Lifesteal +30%, CRIT DMG +60%. With Vigor: CRIT DMG +80%, and deal extra damage equal to 15% of Max HP, capped at 260% ATK
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_349: *Pierce Kill: This skill's CRIT DMG +60%. CRIT Rate doubled against enemies below 60% HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_342: *Vigilance: Negates the next active skill damage taken. Removed after being hit by an active skill. Max 1 stack
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_343: *Calm: Basic Stats +8%. After your next active skill, restores 6% Max HP. If at full HP, gains a shield equal to 5% Max HP for 1 turn. Effect removed after triggering
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_342: *Ultra-Vigilance: Negates the next active skill damage taken. Removed after being hit by an active skill. Max 2 stack
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_343: *Ultra-Calm: Base stats +8%. After your next active skill, restores 10% Max HP. If at full HP, gains a shield equal to 8% Max HP for 1 turn. Effect removed after triggering
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_350: *Blood Sacrifice: Crit rate x2.5. Heals all allies for 15% of damage dealt
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_350: Ultra-Blood Sacrifice: Crit rate x3, ATK +20%. Heals all allies for 15% of damage dealt
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_355: *Chaos: Increase this skill's ATK by 60%. Deal 50% more damage to enemies with Weak or under Weak effect, and Stun them for 1 turn
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_356: *Oblivion: For every 2% HP you are missing, CRIT Rate of this attack increases by 6%, and CRIT DMG by 1.5%. This skill cannot trigger lifesteal, and deals extra damage equal to 130% lifesteal rate
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_358: *Ultra-Desperation: Draws all attacks to you, reducing damage taken and extra damage taken by 20% during the effect, and grants immunity to debuffs and Weak.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_355: *Ultra-Chaos: Increase this skill's ATK by 60%. Deal 80% more damage to enemies with Weak or under Weak effect, and Stun them for 1 turn
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_360: *Aegis Strike: This skill's ATK +20%. Grant all allies a shield equal to 20% of this damage for 2 turns
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_360: *Ultra-Aegis Strike: This skill's ATK +20%, PEN Rate +15%. Grant all allies a shield equal to 30% of this damage for 2 turns
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_356: *Oblivion: For every 2% HP you are missing, CRIT Rate of this attack increases by 6%, CRIT DMG by 1.5%, and DMG dealt by 2%. This skill cannot trigger lifesteal, and deals extra damage equal to 130% lifesteal rate
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_361: *White Slash: This skill ignores the damage reduction effect of the target 50%, increases the break rate 20%, and causes additional damage equal to its own initial attack power 400%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_362: *Flash: All ability values ​​are increased by 4%, all skill damage received by all allies is reduced by 12%, and additional damage received by all allies is reduced by 18%
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_361: *Ultra-White Slash: This skill ignores the damage reduction effect of the target, increases the break rate 20%, and causes additional damage equal to your initial attack power 400%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_365: *Rift Slash: This skill cannot CRIT, and will cause additional damage of CRIT DMG 30%. When you have He Blade Breakthrough, the target's DEF will be regarded as 0
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_366: *Enhanced Kagune Edge: Critical hit damage is increased 6%, all our attack power is increased 2%, and block rate is increased 3%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_367: *Kagune Edge Ascension: The critical hit damage of all our team members is increased by 60%, and the basic ability value is increased by 25%. When our character releases a single skill attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 40%. When releasing all skills to attack, it will cause additional damage of the carrier's critical hit damage 15%.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_365: *Ultra-Rift Slash: This skill cannot CRIT, causing DMG Increase 30% and additional damage of CRIT DMG50%. When you have He Blade Breakthrough, the target's DEF will be regarded as 0
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_368: *Kagune Lacerate: PEN Rate +30%, inflicts 2 extra Weak points. If the target is immune to Weak, deals extra damage equal to 100% of ATK. If the target is already Weak, this extra damage is doubled
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_368: *Ultra Kagune Lacerate: PEN Rate 40%, inflicts 2 extra Weak points. If the target is immune to Weak, deals extra damage equal to 160% of ATK. If this skill makes the target Weak or the target is already Weak, this bonus damage is doubled.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_369: *Kagune Activation: Single instance of damage taken cannot exceed 35% of Max HP. Basic stats +3%, non-active skill damage +5%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_370: *Steal: Transfers the target's reduced stats to the caster.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_371: *Disordered Action: Unable to act, basic stats -6%, damage taken from the first active skill each turn +50%.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_372: *Dark Ambush: Clear all buff and stance effects from the target. If the attacker's HP percentage is higher than the target's, damage dealt increases by 40%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_373: *Confusion: Damage taken from active skills +30%, extra damage taken +30%. Store 100% of damage taken when attacked; the stored damage will be settled when the effect is dispelled. This damage cannot exceed 1000% of the caster's initial HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_374: *Severing Edge: Set Healing Rate, Lifesteal Rate and Regeneration Rate to 0. After the bearer uses an active skill, disable their passive skills until the end of their turn
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_372: *Ultra-Dark Ambush: Clear all buff and stance effects from the target. If the attacker's HP percentage is higher than the target's, damage dealt increases by 40%, and deal extra damage equal to 12% of the attacker's Max HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_376: *Nightmare Corrosion: This skill damage ignores damage sharing effects and cannot hit critically. The total damage is increased by 15% of your Critical Damage, capped at 60%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_377: *Command: Basic stats increase by 4%. When this effect ends, gain a shield equal to 10% of your Max HP for 1 turn.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_378: *Command: All basic stats increase by 3%. This effect doubles when your HP falls below 20%. All extra damage taken is reduced to 1. This effect wears off once the damage reduction takes place
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_379: *Disorder: ATK-related stats increase by 4%, damage taken increases by 5%, and whenever you deal damage, you lose 3% of your Max HP and deal extra damage equal to 40% of your ATK.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_376: *Ultra-Nightmare Corrosion: This skill damage ignores damage sharing effects and cannot hit critically. The total damage is increased by 25% of your Critical Damage, capped at 100%
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_378: *Ultra-Command: All basic stats increase by 4% and Block Chance increases by 5%. This effect doubles when your HP falls below 50%. All extra damage taken is reduced to 1. This effect wears off once the damage reduction takes place
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_380: *Suppression Field: All allies gain 50% ATK, all enemies lose 20% ATK. Damage dealt and extra damage dealt are reduced by 20%.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_381: *Collapse Strike: This skill's damage increases by 30%. For every 6% higher your ATK is than the target's, the skill multiplier increases by 5%, up to a maximum of 30%. Ignores the target's shield.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_382: *Tactical Support: After acting, your ATK and Max HP increase by 5%, up to 4 stacks. Record 30% of the damage dealt this time; the recorded value cannot exceed 80% of the attacker's initial Max HP. When using an active skill attack, deal extra damage equal to the recorded value. This damage ignores 50% of the target's extra damage reduction.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_383: *Exaltation: All allies' damage dealt increases by 6%. This effect is doubled on yourself. Your damage always critically hits. When the effect ends, recover HP equal to 15% of your initial Max HP. This effect is not affected by Restoration Rate.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_380: *Ultra-Suppression Field: All allies gain 50% ATK. The ally with the highest initial ATK gains an additional 6% ATK. All enemies lose 20% ATK. Damage dealt and extra damage dealt are reduced by 20%.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_384: *Vision: Damage dealt increases by 6%. When this effect ends, all allies clear their Weak values and remove all Weak effects.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_385: *Blessing: DEF increases by 10%. When this effect ends, gain a shield equal to 10% of the caster's initial Max HP for 1 turn.
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_384: *Ultra-Vision: Damage dealt increases by 6%. When using an active skill to attack, damage dealt increases by 5% per skill level. When this effect ends, all allies clear their Weak values and remove all Weak effects.
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_386: *Full Concentration: ATK increases by 10%. On your first damage dealt, deal extra damage equal to 30% of the caster's Max HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_387: *Bombardment: This skill always hits critically. If targeting 3 or more enemies, deal extra damage equal to 240% of your base ATK. If targeting fewer than 3 enemies, raise the skill multiplier by 40%
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_388: *Ability Amplification: All basic stats +5%, damage dealt +4%. Grants Skill Amplification for 5 turns when this effect expires
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_389: *Skill Amplification: All stats +3%, active skill damage +6%, up to 5 stacks
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_387: *Ultra-Bombardment: This skill always hits critically. If targeting 3 or more enemies, deal extra damage equal to 350% of your base ATK. If targeting fewer than 3 enemies, raise the skill multiplier by 80%
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_396: *UItra-Wave: This skill's damage dealt increases by 40%. Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 35% of the damage dealt skill for 1 turn
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_396: *Wave: Skill multiplier increases by 40% if the target carries a Shield. If the target has no Shield, ignore the target's DEF and Block Chance, and grant all allies a Shield equal to 20% of the damage dealt for 1 turn
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_397: *Wave Strike: All allies gain +4% DEF and Max HP, and their non-active skill damage increases by 5%
tid#Skill_SupEntryDesc_391: *Ultra-Gash: Reduce DEF-related by 12%. When damage taken reaches 20% of Max HP, take Truth damage equal to 320% of the attacker's ATK and reset the damage counter
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_390: *Blood Surge: If the enemy's HP percentage is equal to or lower than yours, this skill's damage dealt increases by 50%. If their HP percentage is equal to or higher than yours, this skill deals bonus damage equal to 6% of your Max HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_391: *Gash: Target's DEF-related stats are reduced by 8%. Once total damage taken reaches 20% of their Max HP, they take bonus damage equal to 320% of the caster's ATK, and the accumulated damage counter resets
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_392: *Grudge: When taking damage, absorb 30% of the damage taken and store the absorbed value as Grudge stacks. The stored value cannot exceed 100% of the bearer's base Max HP
tid#Skill_EntryDesc_393: *Outrage: Increases Max HP by 6% and reduces damage taken from skills by 3%
